description_long: This sculpture depicts a dramatic bust of a human figure with an expressive, open-mouthed face, possibly in a shout or cry. The head is adorned with a wild, textured mass resembling stylized hair or foliage, giving the piece a dynamic and energetic appearance. The bust is mounted on a rounded base, with the shoulders and upper chest roughly modeled, and the back showing a continuation of the textured hair. The surface is matte and appears to be made of a light brown, stone-like material, with visible tool marks and a rough finish. The sculpture sits on a rectangular slab, possibly for stability or display. There are no visible inscriptions, plaques, or artist signatures on the base or surrounding area.
description: A dramatic bust of a human figure with wild, textured hair and an expressive, open-mouthed face, rendered in a rough, light brown stone-like material. The sculpture is mounted on a rounded base and sits atop a rectangular slab.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the expressive face, open mouth, and detailed, spiky hair texture.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the protruding hair texture and the profile of the face, with the base and slab visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head with dense, textured hair and the simple, rounded base.
description_view_3: Right-side view focusing on the dramatic facial expression and the continuation of the textured hair.
attribute_subject_matter: expressive human bust with stylized hair
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is displayed on a flat slab, suggesting an outdoor or semi-public setting, but no specific environmental context is visible.
